description: Product Description This quality natural canvas and cotton bag, makes the perfect, practical beach, shopping, tote bag, that can be carried across the shoulder or by hand. Design, Invent, Print! is proud to offer our unique and exclusive designs on this quality, very popular tote bag. EXCLUSIVITY Our designs are created in house, and quite often originate from a hand drawing, by a traditional artist, something which is quite unheard of in the digital world we live in! BAG FEATURES Polka dot internal pocket to organise small items, Polka dot cotton lining, Polka dot canvas handles Design appears on one side only (allowing the receiver to show blank side when required) Coconut button on front of bag (for aesthetics only, not used to close bag) Open top bag, no zip, tan/brown beach/shopping tote bag Plenty of space to carry those essential items Dimensions: 46cm x 40cm x 15cm Washed canvas front and back Handle length 61cm Hand Wash Our original and exclusive designs are expertly printed on this quality women's tote bag. Stunning, perfectly matched tan with brown tones ... When you gift this tote bag, the receiver will instantly know and appreciate your efforts to secure one of the best, printable yet extremely practical gift bags you will find anywhere in the UK. A practical gift that is strong enough to be used throughout the year . A constant reminder that will help them think of you. Always printed with a thoughtful and appropriate message that will demonstrate you truly care . You can't beat natural cotton and canvas for strength and durability ... Bags are a fantastic way to show off one's taste and style and even display a hint of personality.
